briefdescription.para: Identify the region of sys_notify flags available for containing services.

detaileddescription.para: Bits of the flags field of the sys_notify structure at and above this position may be used by extensions to the sys_notify structure.

These bits are intended for use by containing service implementations to record client-specific information. The bits are cleared by sys_notify_validate(). Use of these does not imply that the flags field becomes public API.
